files.description: Public forward map from Maru2022/lexEN WordNet sense keys to Glite concept IDs.
Machine-readable coverage summary for the public coarsening subset.
Small report-local alias table for legacy/British WordNet sense keys absent from the public forward map.

name: Glite Coarsening Subset for Maru2022
short_description: Public WordNet sense-key to Glite concept-id subset needed for lexEN coarse-sense label layers and agreement metrics.
size_description: 3 vendored files totaling about 2.1 MB; the public mapping file contains 10,412 WordNet sense-key mappings and the alias file contains 5 report-local aliases.
